title: Find IRCC application forms and instructions - Canada.ca
content:
## Find IRCC application forms and instructions
Depending on the program you’re applying for, there might be multiple forms you must fill out and submit together.

## Find an application form or checklist

## Explore immigration programs
If you want to live, work or study in Canada, you can answer a few questions to get a list of programs that you may be interested in.

## Find an application package

### Immigrate, visit, work or study
- Verification of Status (VOS) or replacement of an immigration document
- Correct an error on your temporary resident document
- Correct an error on your Record of Landing or your Confirmation of Permanent Residence

#### Visit or transit through Canada
- Electronic Travel Authorization (eTA)
- Visitor visa (Temporary resident visa)
- Super visa (for parents and grandparents)
- Transit through Canada
- Change conditions or extend your stay as a visitor
- Stay in Canada as a temporary resident permit (TRP) holder
- Temporary resident permit (TRP) for victims of human trafficking
- Correct an error on your temporary resident document
- Verification of Status (VOS) or replacement of an immigration document
- Rehabilitation for Persons who are Inadmissible to Canada because of Past Criminal Activity
- Study permit application
- Extend or change the conditions on your study permit
- Visitor visa for students – from within Canada
- Study and work as an international student
- Correct an error on your temporary resident document
- Verification of Status (VOS) or replacement of an immigration document
- Work permit – from within Canada
- Work permit – from outside of Canada
- Work permit under the Atlantic Immigration Pilot
- Work Permit for victims of human trafficking
- Study and work as an international student
- Post-graduate work permit (PGWP)
- Extend or change the conditions on your work permit
- Create an International Experience Canada (IEC) profile
- Apply for an IEC work permit (after being invited to apply )
- Visitor visas for workers – from within Canada
- Correct an error on your temporary resident document
- Verification of Status (VOS) or replacement of an immigration document

- Application for Permanent Residence under the Temporary Public Policy for Extended Families of Former Language and Cultural Advisors
- Application for Permanent Residence under the updated temporary Public Policy for extended family members of Afghan Interpreters
- Atlantic Immigration Program
- Atlantic Immigration Pilot Atlantic Intermediate-Skilled Program Atlantic High-Skilled Program Atlantic International Graduate Program Work permit under the Atlantic Immigration Pilot
- Atlantic Intermediate-Skilled Program
- Atlantic High-Skilled Program
- Atlantic International Graduate Program
- Work permit under the Atlantic Immigration Pilot
- Caregivers Home Care Workers Immigration pilots: Child Care and Home Support Home Child Care Provider Pilot and Home Support Worker Pilot Live-in Caregivers in Canada
- Home Care Workers Immigration pilots: Child Care and Home Support
- Home Child Care Provider Pilot and Home Support Worker Pilot
- Live-in Caregivers in Canada
- Economic Mobility Pathways Pilot
- Family-based permanent residence pathway for people affected by the conflict in Sudan
- Francophone Community Immigration Pilot
- Pathway to permanent residence: In-Canada families of Canadian victims of recent air disasters
- Provincial Nominees - Apply through non-Express Entry
- Provincial Nominees - Apply through Express Entry
- Permanent residence for families of victims of flight PS752
- Permanent residence for in Canada Ukrainian nationals with family members in Canada
- Permanent residence for temporary resident permit holders
- Permanent Residence Pathway for Colombian, Haitian and Venezuelan Nationals
- Permanent residence pathway for foreign nationals who were in state care
- Quebec Investors and Entrepreneurs
- Quebec-Selected Skilled Workers
- Right of Permanent Residence Fee loan application
- Rural and Northern Immigration Pilot
- Rural Community Immigration Pilot
- Self-Employed Persons
- Temporary Public Policy: Out-of-status construction workers in the Greater Toronto Area (GTA)
- Temporary resident to permanent resident pathway
- Correct an error on your Record of Landing or your Confirmation of Permanent Residence
- Verification of Status (VOS) or replacement of an immigration document

#### Sponsor a family member
- Spouse, partner or dependent child
- Parents and Grandparents
- Adopted children and other relatives
- Correct an error on your Record of Landing or your Confirmation of Permanent Residence
- Verification of Status (VOS) or replacement of an immigration document

#### Immigrate as a refugee or protected person
- Application for Interim Federal Health Program (IFHP) Coverage
- Application for Permanent Residence under the Temporary Public Policy for Extended Families of Former Language and Cultural Advisors
- Application for Permanent Residence under the updated temporary Public Policy for Extended Families of Former Afghan Interpreters
- Convention Refugees Abroad and Humanitarian Protected Persons Abroad
- Protected Persons and Convention Refugees in Canada
- Refugee Claimants in Canada
- Economic Mobility Pathways Pilot
- Correct an error on your Record of Landing or your Confirmation of Permanent Residence
- Verification of Status (VOS) or replacement of an immigration document
- Community Sponsors, Groups of Five and Sponsorship Agreement Holders and Constituent Groups
- Joint Assistance Sponsorship
- Request to Process Following Family Members under the One-Year Window of Opportunity Provisions
- Request for a Refugee Profile
- Sponsorship Agreement Holder: Organizational Assessment Guide

#### Humanitarian and compassionate considerations
- Application for Permanent Residence under the Temporary Public Policy for Extended Families of Former Language and Cultural Advisors
- Application for Permanent Residence under the updated temporary Public Policy for extended family members of Afghan Interpreters
- Family-based permanent residence pathway for people affected by the conflict in Sudan
- Humanitarian and Compassionate Considerations
- Pathway to permanent residence: In-Canada families of Canadian victims of recent air disasters
- Permanent residence for in Canada Ukrainian nationals with family members in Canada
- Permanent Residence Pathway for Colombian, Haitian and Venezuelan Nationals
- Permanent residence pathways for Hong Kong residents
- Temporary Public Policy: Out-of-status construction workers in the Greater Toronto Area (GTA)
- Temporary resident to permanent resident pathway
- Correct an error on your Record of Landing or your Confirmation of Permanent Residence
- Verification of Status (VOS) or replacement of an immigration document

### Stay in Canada longer
- Visitors - change conditions or extend your stay
- Students - change conditions or extend your stay
- Workers - change conditions or extend your stay
- Visitor visas for workers and students in Canada
- Stay in Canada as a Temporary Resident Permit Holder
- Temporary Resident Permit (TRP) and Work Permit for victims of human trafficking
- Pre-Removal Risk Assessment

### Permanent resident card and documents
- Permanent Resident Card (PR Card) – (initial, renewal or replacement)
- Request to reissue a permanent resident card bearing incorrect information
- Permanent Resident Travel Document (PRTD)
- Voluntary Renunciation of Permanent Resident Status
- Correct an error on valid temporary resident documents, your confirmation of permanent residence or record of landing or protected person document
- Get a  verification of status document or replace an immigration document

#### Apply for Canadian citizenship
- Adults and minor children
- Stateless person born to a Canadian parent
- Adult – Canadian Armed Forces

#### Proof of citizenship (citizenship certificate)
- Apply for a citizenship certificate (or replacement)
- Solemn Declaration Concerning a Citizenship Certificate That Was Lost, Stolen, Destroyed or Never Received

#### Citizenship status and records
- Search of Citizenship Records
- Renounce Canadian Citizenship
- Renounce Canadian Citizenship – R7.1 (for certain persons who acquired citizenship under amendments to the Citizenship Act in 2009 or 2015)
- Resume Canadian Citizenship
- Resume Canadian Citizenship – Canadian Armed Forces
- Find a passport form

### Use of a Representative
- Get the application package

### Access to information and privacy
- Add, change or cancel a representative
- Give someone access to your application
- Access to information and privacy request
- Consent for an access to information and personal information request

### Give feedback about this page
Thank you for your feedback.
